skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for short videos (5-120 seconds).
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate video creation tool. The static analyzer detected shell commands, network requests, and credential access, but these are expected behaviors for an API-integrated tool. The skill uses shell scripts to communicate with the Pexo API service for video generation. No malicious intent or prompt injection detected.

content.value_statement: This skill enables AI agents to create professional short videos (5-120 seconds) by integrating with the Pexo video generation service. It handles the entire workflow from project creation to video delivery.
actual_capabilities: Create video projects and manage project lifecycle
Upload images, videos, and audio files as assets
Send user requests to Pexo AI for video generation
Poll for video generation progress and handle responses
Deliver completed videos with download URLs
limitations: Requires Pexo API credentials (PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL)
Cannot crawl web URLs - files must be downloaded first then uploaded
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for short videos

use_cases.title: Product Video Creation
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for products by uploading product images and describing the desired video style.
use_cases.target_user: E-commerce sellers, marketers, small business owners

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate short videos for TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube Shorts with various aspect ratios.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers, content creators, influencers

use_cases.title: Brand Video Production
use_cases.description: Create brand videos, explainers, and corporate content with professional quality.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second video about [TOPIC]. Use a [STYLE] style.
prompt_templates.scenario: When the user wants a basic video with minimal details

prompt_templates.title: Product Video with Assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a product video for [PRODUCT_NAME]. I've uploaded the product image as an asset. Make it [ADJECTIVE] and professional.
prompt_templates.scenario: When the user provides images to include in the video

prompt_templates.title: Video Revision Request
prompt_templates.prompt: The previous video was good but please make these changes: [LIST OF CHANGES]
prompt_templates.scenario: When the user wants to revise a previously generated video

prompt_templates.title: Complex Multi-Scene Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60-second video with these scenes: [SCENE 1], [SCENE 2], [SCENE 3]. Include [MUSIC/STYLE] and maintain a [MOOD] tone throughout.
prompt_templates.scenario: When the user has specific scene-by-scene requirements

output_examples.input: Create a 15-second promotional video for my coffee shop
output_examples.output:
✅ Your video request has been submitted to Pexo!

Estimated time: 15-20 minutes
Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

I'll notify you when your video is ready.

output_examples.input: I uploaded a photo of my product. Make a video showing it from different angles.
output_examples.output: I've uploaded your product image and sent the request to Pexo. Your video is being generated and will be ready in about 15-20 minutes. I'll let you know when it's done!

best_practices: Relay user messages exactly as provided - do not add creative details that may override Pexo's professional judgment
Wait at least 60 seconds between polling attempts to avoid rate limits
Always include asset tags (<original-image>, <original-video>, <original-audio>) when referencing uploaded files
Send the full video URL including all query parameters to ensure the download works
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style descriptions that the user did not specify
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT state - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not truncate the video URL - the query parameters are required for access
Do not wrap asset IDs in markdown links - they will be ignored

faq.question: How do I configure Pexo?
faq.answer: Create a config file at ~/.pexo/config with PEXO_BASE_URL and PEXO_API_KEY. Run pexo-doctor.sh to verify your setup.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (15 seconds) take approximately 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take longer.

faq.question: What file types can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical), and 1:1 (square). Specify your preference in the request.

faq.question: How do I revise a video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id and call pexo-chat.sh with your feedback. Do not create a new project.

faq.question: Why should I not add my own creative ideas?
faq.answer: Pexo's backend specializes in video production. Adding duration, style, or other details you invented may override its professional judgment and produce lower quality videos.
